mapper.insert: insert into app.advisor_product_flow_log (product_id, product_version_id, operator_id, action_type, comment) values (#{productId}, #{productVersionId}, #{operatorId}, #{actionType}, #{comment})
mapper.select: select id, product_id as productId, product_version_id as productVersionId, operator_id as operatorId, action_type as actionType, comment, created_at as createdAt from app.advisor_product_flow_log where product_id = #{productId} order by created_at desc, id desc

select l.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, l.action_type as actionType, u.nickname as operatorName, l.created_at as createdAt from app.advisor_product_flow_log l inner join app.advisor_product p on p.id = l.product_id inner join app.sys_user u on u.id = l.operator_id order by l.created_at desc limit #{limit}

select l.product_id as productId, p.name as productName, l.action_type as actionType, u.nickname as operatorName, l.created_at as createdAt from app.advisor_product_flow_log l inner join app.advisor_product p on p.id = l.product_id inner join app.sys_user u on u.id = l.operator_id where l.operator_id = #{operatorId} order by l.created_at desc limit #{limit}
